name: Lee Beran Recreation Center
description: Lee Beran Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Emporia, KS. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Reebles Community Pickleball Courts
description: Reebles Community Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Emporia, KS. There are 6 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.
